title: ENVEIL
description: A centralized environment variable and secret management platform for developers. Securely store, encrypt, compare, search, and inject project secrets across multiple applications from a single dashboard.

title: PHYAT
description: URL shortener and link management platform built for Myanmar builders. Shorten, customize, protect, and track links with a clean dashboard and developer-ready API.

title: Realtime Chat App
description: A realtime chat application featuring instant messaging, notifications, online status, and group conversations. Built using Socket.io for live communication and Prisma with PostgreSQL for data management.

title: E-Commerce Platform
description: A full-featured e-commerce system supporting merchants, products, categories and payments. Features include user authentication, product management, shopping cart, and order tracking.

title: API Monitoring Dashboard
description: A full-stack API monitoring dashboard that tracks uptime, latency, and performance for all your services. For intuitive monitoring and integrated with Sentry for automatic error tracking and issue monitoring.

title: Multi-Database Manager CLI
description: A CLI tool to manage multiple databases from a single interface. It supports Postgres, MySQL, and MongoDB and convenient for SQL common operations.

title: NestJS Prisma Generator CLI
description: A CLI tool to generate fully modular NestJS projects with Prisma, featuring pre-configured Swagger, authentication, AWS S3 integration, and Prisma setup.

title: MetaClean Telegram Bot
description: A Telegram bot that extracts and displays image metadata, detects GPS locations with Google Maps links, and provides metadata-free images.

title: Telegram Bot
description: A Telegram bot that can download, convert, cut, and merge YouTube videos into MP3, as well as provide AI chat and OCR features.
